name: stackra/api-sdk
description: Attribute-driven typed SDK for the `apps/api` HTTP surface. Ships the Saloon connector, discovery machinery (`#[AsSdkResource]` + registry), typed exception hierarchy, correlation-id propagation, retry middleware, bearer auth, and mock support. Individual domain resources ship as sibling `stackra-api/*-sdk` packages under each `apps/api/src/modules/<domain>/sdk/` directory — this package auto-discovers them at boot via `olvlvl/composer-attribute-collector` so `$api->tenancy()->find($id)` resolves without any hard-coded resource list.

suggest.saloonphp/laravel-plugin: Optional — enables Saloon's Laravel integration (facade + testing helpers).
suggest.sentry/sentry-laravel: Optional — enables the SentryTracingMiddleware for automatic span attachment on SDK requests.
suggest.stackra/caching: Optional — enables response caching for idempotent GET requests via `#[Cacheable]`.
